metadata.description: Explorium prospecting plugin — autocomplete filters, market stats, previews, CSV/JSON lead matching, enrichment, and event inspection via a vendored vibep CLI.

plugins.name: vibeprospecting-plugin
plugins.description: Explorium prospecting via a vendored vibep CLI backed by an MCP token gateway. Autocomplete filters, run stats, fetch previews, match CSV/JSON inputs, enrich ids, and inspect events.
